document_identity.principal_address: 7930 Jones Branch Drive, Suite 1100, McLean, Virginia 22102

franchise_term.renewal_notes: No renewal right. Re-licensing at franchisor's sole discretion with potentially materially different terms.

territory.protected_territory: None in standard agreement. Restricted Area Provision may be negotiated for New Development or Conversion.
territory.encroachment_protections: Minimal. Excludes other brands, gaming, timeshare, 4+ hotel acquisitions, Strategic Partnerships.
territory.franchisor_competition_rights: Unrestricted with all other Hilton brands and Other Businesses

trademarks.special_risk: No federal registration for 'LivSmart Studios by Hilton' or 'LivSmart'. Less legal protection. Risk of challenge requiring rebranding.

noncompete.during_term: Cannot own/license/franchise a Competing Brand. May be franchisee of competitor, non-exclusive manager of competitor, or minority owner.

dispute_resolution.venue: US District Court, Eastern District of Virginia (Alexandria), or Fairfax County, VA state court; New York backup if no federal jurisdiction

termination.by_franchisee: Not authorized. Unilateral termination = material breach + liquidated damages.
termination.by_franchisor_without_cause: Condemnation or casualty only (with LD release under conditions)

liquidated_damages.post_opening_before_2nd_anniversary: Greater of: (a) 60x Hotel's Average Monthly Royalty Fees; or (b) $10,000 x approved guest rooms
liquidated_damages.last_60_months: Average Monthly Royalty Fees x remaining months

permitted_without_consent: private minority (<50%, no change of control)
transfer.change_of_ownership_requires: New franchise agreement, PIP, transferee qualifications, indemnification

guaranty.required_guarantors: Determined case-by-case; may include spouse of owner
guaranty.additional_guaranty_triggers: Default notice, lender comfort letter, cross-collateralized/cross-defaulted loans

item19.statement: We do not make any representations about a franchisee's future financial performance or the past financial performance of company-owned or franchised outlets.

item20.gag_clause_statement: During the last 3 fiscal years, we have not signed provisions restricting any LivSmart Studios by Hilton franchisee's ability to speak about their experience with us.

item21.debt_guarantee: Unconditionally and irrevocably guarantees certain Hilton debt obligations maturing 2025-2033. All assets and franchise contracts pledged as collateral.

material_pending: AAAA Property Partners v. Hilton (breach of contract, HGI termination)
In re Extended Stay Hotel Antitrust Litigation (IDeaS RMS class action)
Hanson Dai v. SAS Institute (IDeaS/SAS pricing class action)
Ryan Segal v. Amadeus (Amadeus data sharing class action)
Jeanette Portillo v. CoStar Group (STR data sharing class action)

special_risks.description: Mediation, arbitration, and/or litigation required in Virginia unless franchisor sues where hotel is located. Backup: New York.
No federal trademark registration for 'LivSmart Studios by Hilton' or 'LivSmart'. Less legal protection. Risk of challenge requiring rebranding at franchisee expense.

supplier_economics.groups360_equity_interest: Non-controlling interest held by Hilton JV Acquisition LLC

technology_refresh.refresh_cost_estimate: Same or less than original installation

partners: Small Luxury Hotels of the World LTD (SLH)
strategic_partnerships.classification: Other Businesses under FA; may operate in Restricted Area

includes: breakfast if included in room rate
excludes: tax-like fees passed to third parties
grr_definition.mandatory_guest_fee_definition: Any separate fee charged in addition to base room rate (resort fees, facility fees, destination fees, amenity fees, urban destination fees)

unresolveds.description: Primary brand marks 'LivSmart Studios by Hilton' and 'LivSmart' not federally registered. Four applications pending. Risk of challenge and rebranding at franchisee expense.
Zero operating history. No hotels have ever operated under this brand. No track record of guest satisfaction, operational viability, brand recognition, or system reliability.
No financial performance representations provided. With zero operating hotels, franchisees have no franchisor-sourced economic data for investment analysis.
Monthly Program Fee (2.0-2.5% GRR) spending breakdown not itemized. Franchisor has sole discretion on allocation.
Entity guarantees Hilton debt (2025-2033) and has all assets pledged as collateral. Structural subordination risk for franchisees.
Note 9 to financial statements contains apparent date error ('March 18, 2024' should read '2025').

contradictions.description: Note 9 subsequent events evaluation date reads 'March 18, 2024' but audit report is dated 'March 18, 2025'. Likely typographical error.
contradictions.resolution_status: Unresolved — noted as likely typo; 2025 date on audit report is controlling
